title: Beyth #1026
definition:
Beth-arabah = "house of the desert valley" or "place of the depression"

 1) a place in Judah or in Benjamin, site unknown
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-arabah = "house of the desert valley" or "place of the depression"

 1) a place in Judah or in Benjamin, site unknown

    NASB:  place of the depression, a place near the Dead Sea
